items.title: Pew Pew Wars | Funny Sci-fi Space Star Noises Science for Geek Men Women T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: pew, wars, sci, space, star, noises, science, geek, women. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
